titleStmt.title: SII 38.528: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 528. (A.R. No. 528 of 1912.) ŪṬṬATTŪR, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT. On the main gōpura, left of entrance, Siddharatnēśvara temple.

summary.p: It is in the 15th century characters. Purport is not very clear. Seems to refer to the settlement of a dispute, which arose on account of the death of certain Kāṅgayaṉ, who was holding some office. Two persons Sūrāṇḍār and Ariyāṇḍār are stated to have settled the dispute by paying ten poṉ to Nayiṉān who staked his claim to this position.
It is also recorded that Vīrappa Āchāri and Narasiṉāgaṉ wrote this record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
varuṣam māci mātam �§ nāku ceṭṭināyakkar Ellākkinayiṉār piḷḷai nā
Ūṟṟattūr vaṭakku vāy cellaammai caṉṉatiyile Iruntu tuluya māmaṇi Icurar
tīṟtapiṟacātamum teḷittuk koṇṭu tāṉam Ukantaṭumaik koṇṭār Ūṟaināyakar nayiṉāṅ kuṭṭi
nayiṉār kurukkaḷ Ariyānampiyār mutalipe(ai)r ciṉṉamāṭṭik kāliṅkarāyar kūttāṇṭi paccainayi
ṉārānaṇṭi nallapiḷḷai parañcoti maṟuḷaiyar koyilkaṇakku Ūṟai nāyakappiriyar Ivarkaḷai kūṭṭi
Iruntu piriyāṇṭār cūrar Āṇṭār cella nayiṉāṉum vaḻakkukku varukaiyil vaḻak
(k)ku vakaiyaṟuttu coṉṉapaṭikkai kāṅkayaṉ kālam paṇṇukaiyil Avaṉukku cella
nayiṉāṉiṭatāy koḷḷi vaikkayil Avaṉ Urumai ceytattukku cūrāṇṭārum Ariyarā
ṇṭārum pattu poṉ kuṭukka cella nayaṉāṉ paṟṟikkoḷḷavum kāṇiyāṭcikkum
cellanayiṉāṉukkum piṟāti Illai Ippaṭi vakaiyaṟa kāṇiyā
ṭṣikku Iṉimel yātām Oruvar vilakutalai coṉṉavaṉ keṅkaik karaiyile kārāmpacuvaik ko
ṉṟa toṣattile pokakkaṭavarākavum virappaācāri
yum nāraciñkaṉum Iruvarum veṭṭiṉa kalveṭṭu §
Digital edition of SII 38.528 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
